CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(New_Entered_At__c)), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Assigned_Entered_At__c)), Assigned_Entered_At__c - New_Entered_At__c, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Working_Entered_At__c)), Working_Entered_At__c - New_Entered_At__c, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Under_Review_Entered_At__c)), Under_Review_Entered_At__c - New_Entered_At__c, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Qualified_Entered_At__c)), Qualified_Entered_At__c - New_Entered_At__c, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Retainer_Agreement_Sent_Entered_At__c)), Retainer_Agreement_Sent_Entered_At__c - New_Entered_At__c, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Retainer_Agreement_Signed_Entered_At__c)), Retainer_Agreement_Signed_Entered_At__c - New_Entered_At__c, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Turned_Down_Entered_At__c)), Turned_Down_Entered_At__c - New_Entered_At__c, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Referred_Out_Entered_At__c)), Referred_Out_Entered_At__c - New_Entered_At__c, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Converted_Entered_At__c)), Converted_Entered_At__c - New_Entered_At__c, IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "New"), NOW() - New_Entered_At__c, NULL )))))))))), NULL )
CustomField.label: Time in New (Days)
